calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Parinaz Hassani, for appellant/defendant is present;
Jeanie Zimmerman, leasing agent, for appellant/defendant is also present;
Alexander Timmons, for respondent/plaintiff is present.

This case comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo.

Alexander Timmons, respondent/plaintiff, testifies on his own behalf.

Parinaz Hassani, appellant/defendant, testifies on her own behalf.

Jeanie Zimmerman, leasing agent, testifies on behalf of appellant/defendant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Marc Seidenfeld; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Continued To Feb-15-19 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
